hero.title: Agent Marketplace
hero.description: A marketplace for industry-ready agent services, including digital employees, professional software agents, embodied agents, and industry collaboration agents. Use tags and industry filters to quickly find agents that can be trialed, integrated, and orchestrated.

filters.title: Filter by industry and scenario
filters.description: Start with marketplace-style cards. Later this can connect to ratings, trials, subscriptions, permissions, usage metering, and private enterprise publishing.

items.name: Contract Review Agent
items.description: For procurement, sales, legal, and project management, automatically identifies contract clause risks, missing terms, obligations, and approval concerns.
items.value: Reduces manual review effort and gives business teams structured risk hints before approval submission.

items.name: Digital Legal Agent
items.description: Uses enterprise policies, regulations, historical cases, and Q&A knowledge to support legal consultation, policy retrieval, and document drafting.
items.value: Turns common legal questions into self-service answers while keeping citations and review trails.

items.name: Business Analysis Agent
items.description: Connects operating metrics, finance data, customer data, and project progress to generate daily briefs, anomaly alerts, and cause analysis.
items.value: Helps managers move from reading dashboards to asking business questions and finding root causes faster.

items.name: Battlefield Simulation Agent
items.description: Supports complex situation simulation, resource-constraint assessment, and plan comparison with explainable and reviewable tabletop assistance.
items.value: Helps teams run situation simulation and plan evaluation within safety boundaries, improving simulation efficiency and review quality.

items.name: Drone Monitoring Agent
items.description: Connects drone imagery, flight tasks, spatial grids, and alert rules to identify anomalies and generate inspection reports.
items.value: Turns drone-collected data into assignable tasks and traceable response loops.

items.name: Data Governance Agent
items.description: Supports data asset inventory, quality checks, metric definition explanation, and lineage analysis for an intelligent data foundation.
items.value: Lowers the barrier to data governance so business users can understand data sources, quality issues, and metric definitions.

items.name: Emergency Command Agent
items.description: Provides continuous assistance for incident situation fusion, plan matching, resource dispatch, and task tracking.
items.value: Unifies event summaries, response suggestions, team and supply status, and acknowledgements into one command chain.

items.name: Urban Risk Assessment Agent
items.description: Integrates people, vehicles, places, events, and risk-source data to continuously discover urban public safety and governance risks.
items.value: Turns cross-agency clues into explainable risk lists and spatial situation views for earlier intervention.

items.name: Industrial Equipment Inspection Agent
items.description: Connects equipment sensors, inspection records, repair tickets, and expert knowledge to identify abnormal trends and suggest actions.
items.value: Helps factories move from scheduled inspection to predictive maintenance, reducing downtime and repeated diagnosis.

items.name: Proposal Writing Agent
items.description: Uses enterprise knowledge, product material, and historical bids to assist with proposal outlines, response points, and differentiation.
items.value: Lets presales teams create editable drafts quickly and spend more time on customer insight and solution refinement.

items.name: Supply Chain Collaboration Agent
items.description: Connects procurement, inventory, logistics, suppliers, and delivery milestones to monitor exceptions and suggest actions.
items.value: Finds delivery risks earlier and turns cross-team communication into trackable task flows.

items.name: Low-altitude Resource Dispatch Agent
items.description: Supports mission orchestration, resource matching, and execution tracking for low-altitude inspection, emergency communication, delivery, and airspace resources.
items.value: Upgrades low-altitude resources from one-off task execution into schedulable, reviewable, and collaborative business capability.
